channel.title: Politics on The Daily Thrum
channel.description: Recent content in Politics on The Daily Thrum

item.title: Podcaster Furious After Followers Start Tagging Him With “Owning Nothing And Being Happy Doesn’t Sound That Bad, Really”
item.description:
LONDON — British podcaster Julian May has reportedly entered a state of ideological emergency after dozens of users began tagging him on X with the phrase, “Owning nothing and being happy doesn’t sound that bad, really.”

May, host of the popular doom podcast Mayday, has spent years warning viewers that global elites intend to strip ordinary people of property, autonomy, privacy, national identity and the spiritual inheritance of Western civilisation before instructing them to “own nothing and be happy”.
